implementation_warnings.title: Symptom gate permanently blocks signal for all users
implementation_warnings.citation: knowledge_bus/packages/pkg_kb47_dhea_high_androgen_excess_context/signal_library.yaml:63-64 (symptoms_present: present) and lines 96-99 (symptoms_status: allowed_values [answered_yes, answered_no]); backend/ssot/questionnaire.json — no 'symptoms' key exists; backend/core/analytics/runtime_context_evaluator.py:298-299 — symptoms_present only set if responses.get('symptoms') is present
implementation_warnings.explanation: The questionnaire.json has no 'symptoms' field. The runtime context builder sets symptoms_present only if responses.get('symptoms') is present — it never will be. Both the symptoms_present:present gate and the symptoms_status:disclosure_state gate will ALWAYS fail, permanently blocking signal_dhea_high for every user regardless of their DHEA-S level.
implementation_warnings.required_action: MANDATORY: Remove symptoms_present from required_context hard gates. Remove symptoms_status from required_context hard gates. Per medical authority (DHEA-S_High_Activation_Medical_Research_Review.md:121 — 'Missing symptom context: DOWNGRADE'), symptoms absence is a downgrade not a suppress condition. Downgrade handling must use a different mechanism (output metadata or missing_context_behaviour: emit_context_insufficient with separate soft gate list). Do NOT leave these as hard suppress gates.

implementation_warnings.title: Pregnancy gate permanently blocks signal for all users
implementation_warnings.citation: knowledge_bus/packages/pkg_kb47_dhea_high_androgen_excess_context/signal_library.yaml:85-89 (pregnancy_status: allowed_values [answered_no]); backend/ssot/questionnaire.json — no 'pregnancy_status' field; backend/core/analytics/runtime_context_evaluator.py:280-296 — pregnancy_status only set if _field_answered(responses, 'pregnancy_status') or _field_answered(lifestyle, 'pregnancy_status')
implementation_warnings.explanation: The questionnaire.json has no pregnancy_status field. The runtime context builder will never add pregnancy_status to the clinical_context bucket. The gate evaluator sees the key as absent → observed=None → not in [answered_no] → gate fails. This blocks all users.
implementation_warnings.required_action: MANDATORY: Update allowed_values for pregnancy_status to [answered_no, not_answered, not_applicable]. The sprint prompt Phase 2 says 'suppress if pregnancy answered_yes and pregnancy-specific logic is unavailable' — meaning not_answered and not_applicable must pass. Since there is no pregnancy question in the current questionnaire, the effective state will always be not_answered; the gate must allow this. Only answered_yes should suppress.

implementation_warnings.title: AAS exposure gate blocks users who skip the optional supplements question
implementation_warnings.citation: knowledge_bus/packages/pkg_kb47_dhea_high_androgen_excess_context/signal_library.yaml:80-83 (aas_exposure_status: allowed_values [answered_no]); backend/core/analytics/runtime_context_evaluator.py:384 — aas_state = supplement_state if supplements_answered else DISCLOSURE_NOT_ANSWERED; backend/ssot/questionnaire.json — supplements: required=false
implementation_warnings.explanation: Supplements is optional (required:false). If user skips it, aas_exposure_status=not_answered. Gate only allows answered_no → signal suppressed for any user who did not fill in supplements. Sprint prompt says 'AAS exposure status is captured OR explicitly not answered' — so not_answered must be allowed. Additionally, sprint says AAS=yes should DOWNGRADE not suppress.
implementation_warnings.required_action: MANDATORY: Add not_answered to allowed_values for aas_exposure_status. Consider also removing aas_exposure_status from the hard suppress gate list entirely and handling AAS=yes as a downgrade via output metadata.

implementation_warnings.title: DHEA supplementation gate blocks users who skip optional supplements question
implementation_warnings.citation: knowledge_bus/packages/pkg_kb47_dhea_high_androgen_excess_context/signal_library.yaml:90-93 (dhea_supplementation_status: allowed_values [answered_no]); backend/core/analytics/runtime_context_evaluator.py:388-401 — dhea_supplement_state=not_answered if supplements not answered
implementation_warnings.explanation: If supplements is not answered, dhea_supplementation_status=not_answered. Current gate only allows answered_no → suppressed. Sprint prompt says 'DHEA supplementation status is captured or explicitly not answered' → not_answered must be allowed.
implementation_warnings.required_action: MANDATORY: Add not_answered to allowed_values for dhea_supplementation_status. answered_yes remains correctly suppressive. answered_no and not_answered should both allow activation.

implementation_warnings.title: HRT gate suppresses when it should only downgrade
implementation_warnings.citation: knowledge_bus/packages/pkg_kb47_dhea_high_androgen_excess_context/signal_library.yaml:74-78 (hormone_therapy_status: allowed_values [answered_no]); backend/core/analytics/runtime_context_evaluator.py:336-353 — hormone_therapy_status=answered_yes if medication contains 'testosterone' or 'hormone'
implementation_warnings.explanation: The long_term_medications question is mandatory. A user on HRT will have hormone_therapy_status=answered_yes. The current gate suppresses the signal. The sprint prompt and medical authority say HRT = DOWNGRADE not suppress.
implementation_warnings.required_action: MANDATORY: Do not use hormone_therapy_status as a hard suppress gate. Remove it from required_context or change it to a non-blocking gate. HRT=yes should produce downgraded/limited output, not silence the signal entirely.

implementation_warnings.title: Day-one estate gate stale condition will cause validator failure
implementation_warnings.explanation: After DHEA-S high is activated, this condition is no longer true. Phase 7 validators must pass. If the gate file is not updated, validate_day_one_launch_estate_gate.py may fail.
implementation_warnings.required_action: MANDATORY: Update day_one_launch_estate_gate_v1.yaml in Phase 5 governance updates to reflect that DHEA-S high is now runtime_active_canonical per this sprint's medical authority. DHEA-S low and unsulfated DHEA remain inactive — note this distinction.

implementation_warnings.title: package_manifest.yaml behavioural_impact must update from NONE to SIGNAL_RUNTIME_ACTIVATION
implementation_warnings.required_action: MANDATORY per Phase 3: set behavioural_impact: SIGNAL_RUNTIME_ACTIVATION.

implementation_warnings.title: test_dhea_s_high_remains_inactive.py asserts the old state and will fail
implementation_warnings.citation: backend/tests/regression/test_dhea_s_high_remains_inactive.py:23-26 — asserts pkg_kb47_dhea_high NOT in activated and IN inactive
implementation_warnings.explanation: After this sprint, DHEA-S high is in activated_packages. This test will fail. The sprint lists test_dhea_dheas_canonicalisation.py as an expected changed file — Cursor must also update or replace the remains_inactive test.
implementation_warnings.required_action: MANDATORY: Replace or update test_dhea_s_high_remains_inactive.py. The test_dhea_s_high_remains_inactive.py test that checks the execution register must be converted to confirm DHEA-S high IS active and DHEA-S low remains inactive.

implementation_warnings.title: testosterone in dependencies.biomarkers is metadata only — not a runtime blocker
implementation_warnings.citation: knowledge_bus/packages/pkg_kb47_dhea_high_androgen_excess_context/signal_library.yaml:32-36; backend/core/analytics/signal_evaluator.py:453-461 — evaluate_all() checks primary_metric only, not dependencies.biomarkers
implementation_warnings.explanation: The signal evaluator does NOT use dependencies.biomarkers as a hard activation gate. Testosterone listed there is metadata only. For clarity, consider moving it to optional_dependencies to match the sprint intent that testosterone is STRONGLY_RECOMMENDED but not required.
implementation_warnings.required_action: ADVISORY: Move testosterone from dependencies.biomarkers to optional_dependencies.biomarkers. Not a blocker for activation correctness.

hardening_notes: Prompt is structurally sound and correctly classified HIGH/BEHAVIOUR/TWO_PHASE_START_FINISH. All five front matter fields valid. Medical authority file exists and contains all three required tokens (DHEA_S_HIGH_ACTIVATE_NOW, standalone_signal_allowed:true, corroboration_required:false) confirmed with line citations. Package is confirmed inactive with identity resolved. Nine implementation warnings documented — five are CRITICAL or HIGH and represent gates in the existing signal_library.yaml that will permanently block activation unless Cursor corrects them. Most critical: the symptom gate and pregnancy gate will suppress the signal for ALL users because the questionnaire has no 'symptoms' or 'pregnancy_status' fields. Cursor must address all MANDATORY items before Phase 7 validators can pass. GPT architectural review and human approval required before merge per HIGH risk route.
